sources.name: CMU Enron Email Dataset
sources.license: No explicit reusable content license stated on the official page
sources.original_label_meaning: workplace email released from the FERC investigation
sources.language_scope: primarily English; must be audited per message
sources.limitations: Contains real private workplace communications, may include spam/newsletters, and requires privacy-sensitive handling.

sources.name: Apache SpamAssassin Public Corpus easy_ham
sources.license: Message copyright remains with the original senders
sources.original_label_meaning: non-spam messages that are usually easy to distinguish from spam
sources.language_scope: mixed/unspecified; must be audited per message
sources.limitations: Public test corpus with retained sender copyright; must never be sent through a live email system.

sources.name: Apache SpamAssassin Public Corpus hard_ham
sources.license: Message copyright remains with the original senders
sources.original_label_meaning: non-spam messages with spam-like HTML or wording
sources.language_scope: mixed/unspecified; must be audited per message
sources.limitations: Useful hard negatives, but no dataset-wide reuse license is stated.

sources.name: Apache SpamAssassin Public Corpus spam
sources.license: Message copyright remains with the original senders
sources.original_label_meaning: generic spam, not a phishing label
sources.language_scope: mixed/unspecified; must be audited per message
sources.limitations: Must remain a separate hard-negative pool and must never be automatically labeled phishing.

sources.name: Multiclass NLP Dataset for Phishing and Social Engineering Threat Detection
sources.original_label_meaning: six-class English email or SMS-like social-engineering messages
sources.assigned_project_label: Phishing=1; all other source labels rejected from this binary positive source
sources.language_scope: declared English; must still be audited per message
sources.limitations: Only explicit Phishing rows are accepted; the corpus is small and mixes email with SMS-like messages.

sources.name: Phishing validation emails dataset
sources.assigned_project_label: Safe Email=0; Phishing Email=1, external evaluation only
sources.language_scope: declared English; must still be audited per message
sources.limitations: Highly duplicated and partly artificial; physically isolated and forbidden from training or threshold selection.

sources.name: SpaPhish
sources.license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International shown by the repository record
sources.limitations: Excluded from the primary English model even if later enabled.

sources.name: PhishTank and OpenPhish feeds
sources.limitations: Must not be converted into email-body labels.
